title: Hide Invis Kills
description: Hides Names in kill msg if you are invisible
body:
Hide Invis Kills is a mod that gives players more anonymity when they are invisible.

As soon as a player with the invisibility effect kills someone or dies themselves, their name is automatically censored in chat and death messages.

Instead of: "The_odgfU was slain by Zombie"

or: "The_odgfU killed Steve"

for example, you will see: "Someone hiding their identity was slain by Zombie"

or: "Steve was killed by someone hiding their identity"
